title: morus lhou
intro: Morus lhou, also known as the Chinese mulberry or white mulberry, is a deciduous tree or shrub native to China and other parts of Asia, characterized by its white flowers and edible fruit. The medicinal properties of Morus lhou include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Morus lhou include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Morus lhou can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or capsule, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
